objective: Implement production-grade observer/publisher execution with fail-closed behavior, scheduler wiring, runtime contract validation, and contract-aligned API tests.
non_goals: multi-forum runtime implementation beyond ppomppu adapter

completed: Observer parsing hardened with fallback selectors and parse-confidence scoring
Manual-review-equivalent fail-closed path added for low-confidence observer snapshots
Publisher safety flow finalized with live-submit gate (DRY_RUN_MODE=false), guard checks, and manual override policy check
Scheduler loop wired to RUN_INTERVAL_MINUTES with in-process overlap lock
Startup runtime contract validation added with schema-backed checks
Workflow definition file added and validated against workflow.schema.json at startup
API-level integration tests implemented for observer, blocked publish, manual override, and scheduler lock behavior
gaps: Observer runtime thresholds are still partly constant-driven and should be read from workflow/decision contracts to prevent policy drift
No live Playwright E2E integration executed against real board environment in this session
No commit created yet in this session

acceptance_criteria: Observer produces contract-valid logs with confidence-aware decision outcomes
Publisher can execute real submit only when DRY_RUN_MODE=false and guard checks pass
Scheduler triggers observer/publisher loop according to RUN_INTERVAL_MINUTES
API responses remain aligned with data-contracts.schema.json
Integration tests cover observer run, blocked publish, and manual override paths

implementation_plan.name: Externalize observer policy from contracts
actions: Load parse_confidence_min and gap_threshold_min from workflow/decision contract sources
Use contract-driven values in runObserver and decision gate

implementation_plan.name: Strengthen runtime validation coverage
actions: Add explicit checks for API contract references and data schema refs
Assert workflow publisher step coverage for required guard actions

implementation_plan.name: Expand integration tests
actions: Add assertions for low-confidence manual-review message behavior
Add startup validation failure test using invalid workflow fixture

practical_recommendations: Start a new session with this handover as the single seed context for cleaner continuity
Keep fail-closed behavior intact when moving policy values from constants to contracts
Do not weaken publisher guards while enabling live publish path
Update state.index last_handover_file after each major milestone
completed_items: Added runtime validation module using AJV and formats support
Refactored server for dependency-injected app creation and scheduler lifecycle hooks
Added workflow manifest file for ppomppu-gonggu-v1 and startup schema validation
Added API integration test suite runnable via npm script

decisions.title: Keep API status contract unchanged while signaling manual review
decisions.rationale: activity-log status enum is fixed to safe/unsafe/error; low confidence is represented as unsafe + explicit error reason to preserve schema compatibility

decisions.title: Inject dependencies for API integration tests
decisions.rationale: Allows deterministic API-level contract tests without requiring live Playwright/browser side effects

constraints: Do not weaken safety guards before enabling live publish
Maintain strict env contract validation at startup
Preserve compatibility with current Express + React + Playwright stack
next_actions: Implement contract-driven observer thresholds and remove duplicated constants
Add tests for low-confidence observer/manual-review behavior
Optionally run a staged live publish dry-run checklist with real profile data
